line: Implemented the alerts panel widget and wired it into the TUI.
- Added a dedicated `AlertsPanel` widget instead of inline alert text.

items: Added a dedicated `AlertsPanel` widget instead of inline alert text.

line: - Panel derives active alerts from both `snapshot.phase` and supporting `AgentState` signals so multiple simultaneous anomalies can appear together.

items: Panel derives active alerts from both `snapshot.phase` and supporting `AgentState` signals so multiple simultaneous anomalies can appear together.

line: - Alert history is loaded from `.saw/alerts.log` and capped to the last 5 entries.

items: Alert history is loaded from `.saw/alerts.log` and capped to the last 5 entries.

line: - Made the alerts panel scrollable with `Up/Down/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End`.

items: Made the alerts panel scrollable with `Up/Down/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End`.

line: - Used severity-driven color coding on the panel title and banners: green/ok, yellow/warning, red/critical.

items: Used severity-driven color coding on the panel title and banners: green/ok, yellow/warning, red/critical.

line: - The existing TUI only rendered a single alert summary from phase state; combining phase + state made it possible to satisfy the “multiple alerts” requirement without changing classifier enums.

items: The existing TUI only rendered a single alert summary from phase state; combining phase + state made it possible to satisfy the “multiple alerts” requirement without changing classifier enums.

line: - `cargo test alerts_panel --lib --bins --tests` does not work here because `saw` has no library target; `cargo test --bin saw ...` is the correct focused path.

items: `cargo test alerts_panel --lib --bins --tests` does not work here because `saw` has no library target; `cargo test --bin saw ...` is the correct focused path.

line: - `cargo test --bin saw` still emits an existing warning for unused `find_session_jsonl` in `src/cmd/common.rs:300`.

items: `cargo test --bin saw` still emits an existing warning for unused `find_session_jsonl` in `src/cmd/common.rs:300`.

line: - The panel is scrollable vertically within a fixed-height region; there is no visual scrollbar glyph yet.

items: The panel is scrollable vertically within a fixed-height region; there is no visual scrollbar glyph yet.
